Mnemonic NFT Gallery

Powered by OpenSea • Auto-updates with your collection

Wallet: 0x78dB...3F43

✨ How This Works

This embed shows all NFTs in your wallet automatically:

  • ✅ Auto-updates when you get new NFTs
  • ✅ Shows marketplace links (OpenSea, looksrare, etc.)
  • ✅ Filters out most spam (OpenSea does this)
  • ✅ Mobile responsive
  • ✅ Zero maintenance - it just works

To feature other users: They connect wallet → Shows their NFTs

Collection-Specific Views

Want to show only specific collections? Use these embeds:

Alsania Genesis Collection

Add Another Collection

Get collection URL from OpenSea, replace below:

https://opensea.io/collection/COLLECTION-NAME?embed=true
